eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Minnesota; at 6:42 AM on JUN 7, 2019 Effective until 7:42 AM. Message from MN BCA.
extra_text: This is a child abduction alert.  The Washington County Sheriff's Office is searching for two abducted Asian females children, ages 1 and 3 years old.   Suspect name Jeffrey Lo, 24-year old Asian male.  Approximately 5' 5", 180 pounds with brown eyes and brown/black hair. Lo was last seen driving a Tan 2004 Toyota Sienna, license number 708XEM.    If you have any information regarding the missing children, call the Washington County Sheriff's Office at 6,5,1,4,3,9,9,3,8,1 or 9,1,1.    Suspect believed to be armed. If located do not take action. Call Law Enforcement Immediately. Stay tuned for further instructions.
